mapper.sql: id, user_id, shop_name, shop_logo, shop_address, description, category, business_hours, rating, sales, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM biz_merchant WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM biz_merchant WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_merchant (user_id, shop_name, shop_logo, shop_address, description, category, business_hours, rating, sales, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{shopName}, #{shopLogo}, #{shopAddress}, #{description}, #{category}, #{businessHours}, #{rating}, #{sales}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_merchant SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
